testcase.name: Happy path generated from cURL
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: status code Expected: <200> but: was <422> at org.hamcrest.MatcherAssert.assertThat(MatcherAssert.java:20) at steps.CommonSteps.theResponseStatusShouldBe(CommonSteps.java:384) at ✽.the response status should be 200(file:///Users/mohammaddaabes/Documents/api/src/test/resources/features/generated/post_admin_v2_customers.feature:27)
testcase.system-out: Given the API base url is "${BASE_URL}".....................................passed And I use bearer token from env "general_manager_token".....................passed And I add header "accept" with value 'application/json'.....................passed And I add header "accept-language" with value 'ar'..........................passed And I add header "content-type" with value 'application/json'...............passed And I add header "pragma" with value 'no-cache'.............................passed And I add header "s-source" with value 'automation'.........................passed When I POST to "/admin/v2/customers" with json body:........................passed Then the response status should be 200......................................failed Then the response header "Content-Type" should equal "application/json".....skipped
